problem id: f64eb796
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) OR SHR(2) OR NOT ROT(5)

examples:
  00001111 -> 10011111
  11000010 -> 10110111
  01001110 -> 00110111
  01100111 -> 10011011
  10011000 -> 11101110
  00010000 -> 11111101
  00111101 -> 11011111

query: 10010100
predicted answer: 01101101
